description: Recycled polyester polyol for CASE applications.
short_description: Recycled polyester polyol designed for coatings, adhesives, sealants and elastomers.
compatibility: Compatible with conventional polyurethane systems and standard isocyanates.
storage: Store in tightly closed containers in a dry place at 20–30°C. Avoid moisture contamination.
solubility: Soluble in common organic solvents used in polyurethane systems.

description: Recovered polyether polyol designed for flexible and rigid foam systems.
short_description: Recovered polyether polyol for flexible and rigid polyurethane foam applications.
features: Suitable for flexible and rigid systems
compatibility: Compatible with conventional isocyanates used in polyurethane foam production.
storage: Store in sealed containers in a dry environment between 20–30°C. Avoid prolonged exposure to air and moisture.
solubility: Miscible with common polyether polyols and compatible polyurethane raw materials.

description: High-performance regenerated polyester polyol for PIR insulation foam board applications.
short_description: Polyester polyol developed for PIR rigid insulation systems.
compatibility: Compatible with conventional PIR polyurethane systems and polymeric MDI.
storage: Store in tightly closed moisture-free containers at 20–30°C.
solubility: Compatible with standard rigid polyurethane additives and catalysts.

description: Sustainable polyester polyol for rigid polyurethane foam board systems.
short_description: Polyester polyol for rigid polyurethane foam insulation systems.
compatibility: Compatible with conventional rigid polyurethane systems and MDI grades.
storage: Store in sealed dry containers away from moisture contamination.
solubility: Miscible with standard rigid PU raw materials.

description: PU coating polyester polyols for furniture and wood finishing applications.
short_description: Polyurethane coating polyols for furniture coating systems.
compatibility: Compatible with conventional PU coating systems.
storage: Store in dry airtight containers at ambient temperature.

description: Industrial polyurethane coating polyols for metal coating systems.
short_description: Polyurethane coating polyols for industrial metal coatings.
compatibility: Compatible with standard solvent-based PU coating systems.
solubility: Soluble in common PU coating solvents.

description: Specialized PU coating polyols for synthetic leather finishing applications.
short_description: PU coating polyols for leather and synthetic leather systems.
compatibility: Compatible with flexible polyurethane coating systems.
storage: Store in tightly sealed dry containers.
solubility: Compatible with leather coating solvents and additives.

description: Polyester polyols developed for laminating adhesive systems.
short_description: Polyester polyols for flexible laminating adhesive systems.
compatibility: Compatible with conventional laminating adhesive systems.

description: Reactive polyurethane hot melt polyols for advanced bonding systems.
short_description: Reactive polyurethane hot melt adhesive polyols.
compatibility: Compatible with reactive PUR hot melt systems.
storage: Store in airtight dry containers away from moisture.
solubility: Compatible with conventional PUR hot melt additives.

description: Specialized polyurethane adhesive polyols for leather bonding applications.
short_description: PU adhesive polyols for leather and footwear bonding systems.
compatibility: Compatible with conventional PU adhesive systems.
storage: Store in sealed dry containers between 20–30°C.
